contracts.//: OpenClaw surfaces a plugin's runtime tools to agents ONLY if they're declared here (cold-metadata discovery; no wildcards). Our per-venue tools are generated from each venue's /spec, so this enumerates the BAKED venues (soccer, taskmarket/work, golf) + the platform/auth tools. A venue discovered at runtime whose prefix isn't listed here won't surface until added + released.

serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.help: Base URL of the AgentNet platform / venue service (the pitch for soccer)

sessionKey.label: Agent identity
sessionKey.help: Stable id for this agent's seat (also the chat session key)

mode.label: Tool tier
mode.help: easy = high-level intents (server computes detail); advanced = raw low-level actions; both = all tools

matchId.label: Auto-join room (optional)
matchId.help: Join this room at startup; normally leave empty and ask your agent to find/create a game

autoJoin.label: Auto quick-match
autoJoin.help: Find-or-create a game at startup (zero-touch bot agent)

identity.label: Display identity
identity.help: Venue-neutral identity sent on join (soccer: name/nation/clan/style; shown in the viewer). Human can change it at runtime via chat where supported.

join.label: Join options
join.help: Venue join params merged into the join body — soccer: teamSize/team; golf: holes; etc. Unknown fields are ignored by the server.

apiKey.label: AgentNet API key (optional)
apiKey.help: Sent as a Bearer token so the server can verify identity (REQUIRE_AUTH deployments)

strategyFile.label: Strategy file (optional)
strategyFile.help: Path to a human-editable markdown file injected into the agent's move prompt

clientCertPath.label: mTLS client certificate (optional)
clientCertPath.help: Path to a client certificate PEM file — only needed to reach a venue gated by Cloudflare mTLS (e.g. staging). Both clientCertPath and clientKeyPath must be set.

clientKeyPath.label: mTLS client key (optional)
clientKeyPath.help: Path to the private key PEM matching clientCertPath.
